examples: However, nowadays, history of wall is somehow destructed with the dismantling of circumvallation and ancient walls.
The top of circumvallation was paved by quadrel , which looks like a wild street, five to six horses can be ridden abreast along it.
I can feel its age from the worn-out circumvallation and watch-tower, some of the circumvallation are lost, some are collapsed in half, the watch - tower has no Windows, some roof are missing.
